title: cordia dodecandra
intro: Cordia dodecandra, also known as the Wild Tea or Toothbrush Tree, is a plant species native to Africa and Asia that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The plant has medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cordia dodecandra include its use in treating digestive issues, fever reduction, and as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cordia dodecandra include infusions and teas made from the leaves and roots, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
